source: World Bank Data360 — Growth & Jobs database; ILO ILOSTAT NEET indicator (SDG 8.6.1)
indicator: Share of youth (15–24) not in employment, education, or training

GH.narrative: About 1 in 4 young Ghanaians aged 15–24 is not in work, school, or training (ILO/World Bank, 2022).

AM.narrative: About 1 in 3 young Armenians aged 15–24 is not in work, school, or training (ILO/World Bank, 2022) — among the highest rates in Eastern Europe & Central Asia.
